content: claude -p with --output-format stream-json emits newline-delimited JSON events. Key event types: system/init (session metadata, tools list), assistant (message with content array of text/tool_use/tool_result blocks), user, and result (final). The result event has: type='result', subtype='success'|'error_...', is_error bool, result string, session_id, total_cost_usd, num_turns, permission_denials array. permission_denials entries have: tool_name, tool_use_id, tool_input. A non-empty permission_denials means a tool was blocked — treat as filing failure even on exit 0. --verbose flag required to include full turn-by-turn output including tool_use and tool_result events. Tool result blocks in assistant message content: {type:'tool_result', tool_use_id:'...', content: string or array}. GitHub MCP issue_write result content is JSON: {id:'<node-id>',url:'https://github.com/.../issues/N'} — id is internal node id NOT the issue number; N is the issue number and lives only in the url path.
